entity.label: Phygellus
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Fugitive, a Christian of Asia, who “turned away” from Paul during his second imprisonment at Rome (2 Tim. 1:15). Nothing more is known of him.

nodes.label: Phygellus
nodes.description: Fugitive, a Christian of Asia, who “turned away” from Paul during his second imprisonment at Rome (2 Tim. 1:15). Nothing more is known of him.

verses.text: This thou knowest, that all they which are in Asia be turned away from me; of whom are Phygellus and Hermogenes.
